_publications._publicationTitle: Re-evaluation of missense variant classifications in NF2.

_contextSnippet: one variant, c.1532A>G, predicted to produce the missense change, p.(Asp511Gly), and not predicted to affect splicing by the MaxEntScan and SpliceSiteFinder‐Like tools, was shown to affect splicing by RNA analysis
details: Failed to predict splicing effects for variant c.1532A>G, which was later confirmed by RNA analysis to cause aberrant splicing
